form.label: SLA Risk & Early Warning
form.description: Early warning dashboard that identifies services trending toward SLA breach using rolling failure analysis. Enables proactive intervention before customer impact occurs.

search.query: `svc_sla_risk($index$)` | stats count(eval(sla_risk="HIGH")) AS high, count(eval(sla_risk="MEDIUM")) AS medium, count(eval(sla_risk="LOW")) AS low | eval risk_score = case( high > 0, 3, medium > 0, 2, true(), 1 ) | eval risk_label = case( risk_score=3, "HIGH", risk_score=2, "MEDIUM", true(), "LOW" )

table.title: Services ranked by rolling failure behavior. HIGH risk services should be investigated immediately.

search.query: `svc_failure_detect($index$)` | timechart span=1h sum(is_failure) AS failures BY service | untable _time service failures | streamstats window=6 avg(failures) AS rolling_failures BY service | eval sla_risk = case( rolling_failures >= 5, "HIGH", rolling_failures >= 2, "MEDIUM", true(), "LOW" ) | stats latest(rolling_failures) AS rolling_failures latest(sla_risk) AS sla_risk BY service | sort - rolling_failures

viz.title: Visualizes accumulation of failure pressure over time. Darker regions indicate periods where services are approaching SLA thresholds.

chart.title: Rolling failure average used to detect gradual reliability degradation before SLA breach conditions are met.

search.query: `svc_failure_detect($index$)` | timechart span=1h sum(is_failure) AS failures | streamstats window=6 avg(failures) AS rolling_failures

div.p: This dashboard identifies services that are trending toward SLA breach before an actual outage or violation occurs.

ul.li: MEDIUM – Increasing failure frequency; monitor closely.
HIGH – Strong likelihood of SLA breach.

div.p: SLA risk is based on rolling failure averages over time, not on single spikes. This reduces noise and focuses on sustained degradation.

ul.li: Use Incident Patterns dashboard for deeper analysis.
